base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_dungeon_entrance_door — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Dungeon entrance doors — 9 visually-distinct shapes (matching Levels 1-9). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dungeon entrance doors — 9 visually-distinct shapes (matching Levels 1-9); each dungeon has a unique entry-graphic on overworld (eagle/moon/manji/snake/lizard/dragon/demon/lion/death-mountain)
